model.label: MiMo-V2-Pro
model.description: MiMo • The flagship foundation for the agentic era, built for complex, long-horizon, multi-step agentic tasks.

pick.rationale: Duke is the #1 overall seed with elite metrics (KenPom/Torvik rank #1) and a 31-2 record, featuring top-4 offense and #1 defense. While UConn is a strong 2-seed with championship pedigree, Duke's superior analytical profile and Cameron Boozer's star power give them the edge despite missing Caleb Foster. The Blue Devils' ability to win close games throughout the ACC season and their overall talent depth should prove decisive in this Elite 8 matchup.

reasoningStep.title: East Regional Final: Duke vs UConn Analysis
reasoningStep.summary: Duke holds significant analytical advantages as the #1 overall seed, but UConn's tournament experience and defensive prowess make this a competitive matchup.
reasoningStep.evidence: Duke ranks #1 in both KenPom and Torvik with elite offensive (rank 4) and defensive (rank 1) efficiency, while UConn's ratings are unavailable but they are a 2-seed with a 29-5 record. Duke is missing starting point guard Caleb Foster (foot fracture), but has shown resilience winning without key players. UConn has tournament experience under Dan Hurley and elite defensive efficiency, but Duke's overall talent depth and Cameron Boozer's star power provide the edge in this anticipated blue-blood matchup.

You have live tools. Use them before making a pick when they can reduce uncertainty.
You are not filling the whole bracket in one response. Predict only the current game.

Before making a pick, investigate relevant context such as injuries or availability concerns, recent team news, prior head-to-head results when useful, and multiple raw statistics from the available ratings and matchup data.
Take a holistic approach. Balance team quality, matchup specifics, health, form, schedule context, and upset risk instead of relying on one metric.
Do not force an upset, but explicitly consider whether the underdog has a credible path to win and let that affect confidence and rationale.
